Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 61 

STEP 

LABEL: Maximum Step Number 

DESCRIPTION: This is a CCW-derived field that indicates whether the prescription was subject to a step therapy 
protocol, according to the benefit structure and formulary for the beneficiary’s plan. If a product is 
part of two different step therapy protocols, this field is populated with the maximum step value for
